scenarios.name: Artifact schema validation
scenarios.description: Validated the April 17 artifact directory with the repository schema validator.
scenarios.details: `node schemas/validate.js content/days/2026-04-17` passes decision.json, feedback-digest.json, test-results.json, spec.md, build-summary.md, and review.md.

scenarios.name: Playwright — game-frost-fern.spec.js
scenarios.description: Locks helper math (applyStatusEffect, tickStatusEffects, getEffectiveSpeed, getEffectiveCadence), runtime chill application to walker + sniper, no-stack refresh merge, non-damage/no-sap contract, 3-layer slow visuals, chill-zone hover preview, sniper/control screening regression, and script-role regression.
scenarios.details: `npm run test:uiux -- tests/uiux/game-frost-fern.spec.js` — 5 tests passed: helper math, walker+sniper slow application, tint/particle/frame-rate visuals, no-stack refresh, and lane-zone preview/non-regression.

scenarios.name: Playwright — game-2026-04-17-flow.spec.js (natural clear, no finishScenario)
scenarios.description: Asserts the Frost Fern Control chip, tutorial Wave 1 'Hold the Lane' (availablePlants ["thornVine"]), Wave 2 'Now It's Too Fast' (availablePlants ["thornVine", "frostFern"]), challenge replay via placeDefender (CHALLENGE_ROSTER_PLACEMENTS mirrors replay-2026-04-17-chilled-lane.json exactly: thornVine r2c0/r1c0/r3c0/r0c0/r4c1/r2c1/r0c1/r4c2/r4c3, sunrootBloom r4c0, frostFern r2c5 @20000ms, brambleSpear r2c4 @68000ms), waits for scenarioPhase transition to 'endless' and challengeCleared===true WITHOUT calling finishScenario(), and locks endless config equals { enemyPool:["briarBeetle","shardMite","glassRam"], startingWave:4, baseCadenceMs:1750, cadenceFloorMs:720, cadenceDropPerWave:120, waveDurationMs:9000 }.
scenarios.details: `npm run test:uiux -- tests/uiux/game-2026-04-17-flow.spec.js` — 1 test passed in ~17.7s. The placements drive the challenge to a natural clear (encounter events exhausted + activeEnemyCount==0 → scenarioPhase=endless) with gardenHP >= 1. No finishScenario()/forceScenarioClear() bypass — the challenge ends because every scripted enemy dies or expires.

scenarios.name: Playwright — game-2026-04-17-replays.spec.js (paired replay probes)
scenarios.description: The deterministic paired-replay gate, running both April 17 replay fixtures in Chromium at timeScale=8 and asserting natural terminal outcomes. replay-2026-04-17-chilled-lane.json drives challenge → cleared (scenarioPhase=endless, challengeCleared=true, gardenHP>=1); replay-2026-04-17-no-control.json (same opening without the Frost Fern) drives challenge → gameover at the ram window. Replaces the prior skipped probe entry that couldn't run under the test-only command allowlist.
scenarios.details: `npm run test:uiux -- tests/uiux/game-2026-04-17-replays.spec.js` — 2 tests passed in ~22.1s: chilled-lane clears in ~12.5s, no-control loses in ~9.3s.

scenarios.name: Playwright — game-board-scout-2026-04-17.spec.js
scenarios.description: Locks the Frost Fern scout detail copy: title `Frost Fern`, description equal to PLANT_DEFINITIONS.frostFern.description, and labels in order Cost / AoE / Slow / Attack Slow / Duration / Notes with values 65 / 3-col lane zone / 40% speed / 25% attack rate / 2.5s / No damage, no sap; refreshes on re-chill (no stack).

scenarios.name: Playwright — game-roster-assets.spec.js (April 17 additions)
scenarios.description: Asserts manifest-backed `frost-fern` (player, 128x128, /game/assets/manual/plants/frost-fern.svg) and `frost-particle` (particle, 24x24, /game/assets/manual/particles/frost-particle.svg) entries resolve with SVG content, plus all prior-day roster assets (April 13 / 15 / 16).
scenarios.details: `npm run test:uiux -- tests/uiux/game-roster-assets.spec.js` — 4 tests passed, covering April 13 roster, April 15 Sunroot, April 16 Briar Sniper, and April 17 Frost Fern + frost-particle manifest entries.

scenarios.name: Prior-day regression — April 14/15/16 Playwright specs
scenarios.description: Runs the prior dated Playwright specs (Board Scout interaction/accessibility/responsive/validation/smoke for April 14, tutorial-to-challenge for April 15, Board Scout + tutorial-challenge-endless gating + shell-responsive for April 16) to guard against both the cadence-helper refactor and the April 17 swept-projectile hit-detection fix.
scenarios.details: `npm run test:uiux -- tests/uiux/game-board-scout-interaction-2026-04-14.spec.js ... tests/uiux/game-shell-responsive-2026-04-16.spec.js` — 26 tests passed in 7.3s (6 workers). No timing drift on prior-day scenarios and no regression from the projectile sweep fix.
